title: QC-GIS
text:
Quad Cities GIS User Group
Establishing a GIS User Group in the quad cities area creates a network of partnerships with local organization and educational institutions. It provides essential professional involvement in our local community, strengthens existing partnerships, and creates access to a pool of local GIS knowledge and resources.
To learn more about Quarto websites visit https://quarto.org/docs/websites.

title: About
text:
QC-GIS is a regional GIS user group for the Quad Cities.
